description: You are an Observability Engineer investigating occasional metrics dropping during peak loads. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'Graphite Health' to monitor the health of the monitoring system by comparing Carbon internals with OS-level hardware metrics. The dashboard must contain exactly four graphs: a graph titled 'Global Ingestion Rate' using sumSeries() on carbon.agents.*.metricsReceived aliased as 'Total Metrics/min'; a graph titled 'Average CPU User Time' using averageSeries() on collectd.*.cpu-*.cpu-user (or collectd.*.cpu.*.cpu-user) aliased as 'Avg User CPU'; a graph titled 'System Load' using collectd.*.load.load.shortterm with aliasByNode() at index 1; and a graph titled 'Carbon Cache Size'
